title: Building Authority: How Expert Video Content Influences AI Models
excerpt: Answer Engines prioritize trust and expertise (E-E-A-T). Learn how producing high-quality, authoritative video content trains AI to view you as the industry standard.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
AI models like ChatGPT and Google's SGE (Search Generative Experience) are trained on vast datasets, but they place a heavy premium on sources that demonstrate Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness (E-E-A-T).

Becoming the Source Data

To succeed at AEO, you must become the entity that AI models trust. High-quality video featuring documented experts, citing verifiable facts, and providing genuine, original insights establishes that authority. When you consistently publish expert video content, AI systems begin to use *you* as the baseline reference for queries in your industry.
